requirement_topic.en: EMC Evidence for Motor Assemblies and Drives
requirement_topic.zh: 电机组件与驱动器 EMC 证据
requirement_topic.zht: 電機組件與驅動器 EMC 證據

summary.en: Standalone industrial motors may be assessed mainly under PNS/IEC 60034 performance and safety expectations, but motor systems sold with variable frequency drives, starters, electronic controllers, or control panels may need EMC evidence under applicable PNS/IEC or IEC-based product standards and buyer specifications.
summary.zh: 单独销售的工业电动机可能主要按 PNS/IEC 60034 性能和安全要求评估，但随变频器、启动器、电子控制器或控制柜销售的电机系统，可能需要按适用 PNS/IEC 或 IEC 类产品标准及买方规格提供 EMC 证据。
summary.zht: 單獨銷售的工業電動機可能主要按 PNS/IEC 60034 性能和安全要求評估，但隨變頻器、啟動器、電子控制器或控制櫃銷售的電機系統，可能需要按適用 PNS/IEC 或 IEC 類產品標準及買方規格提供 EMC 證據。

standards_or_laws: Applicable IEC-based EMC standards for drives or electronic controllers
BPS/DTI product standards where included in mandatory scope

summary.en: China motor documentation commonly includes GB 18613 efficiency evidence, GB 12665 cooling evidence, CCC where applicable, and sometimes GB/T or IEC EMC reports for drives or control equipment. These reports should be checked against the exact Philippines system configuration.
summary.zh: 中国电机文件通常包括 GB 18613 能效依据、GB 12665 冷却依据、适用时的 CCC，以及驱动器或控制设备的 GB/T 或 IEC EMC 报告。应按准确的菲律宾系统配置核查这些报告。
summary.zht: 中國電機文件通常包括 GB 18613 能效依據、GB 12665 冷卻依據、適用時的 CCC，以及驅動器或控制設備的 GB/T 或 IEC EMC 報告。應按準確的菲律賓系統配置核查這些報告。

standards_or_laws: CCC catalogue requirements for motors under 1 kV where applicable

gap.en: A bare motor and a motor-plus-drive package can have different Philippines compliance expectations. China EMC reports for a drive or panel may not cover the exported combination, cable lengths, filters, enclosure, or 60 Hz operating configuration.
gap.zh: 裸电机与电机加驱动器套装在菲律宾可能适用不同合规期望。中国驱动器或控制柜 EMC 报告可能不覆盖出口组合、电缆长度、滤波器、外壳或 60 Hz 运行配置。
gap.zht: 裸電機與電機加驅動器套裝在菲律賓可能適用不同合規期望。中國驅動器或控制櫃 EMC 報告可能不覆蓋出口組合、電纜長度、濾波器、外殼或 60 Hz 運行配置。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — depends on whether electronics, drives, panels, or buyer-mandated EMC standards are included
mandatory_status.cn: Conditional — CCC and EMC evidence depend on product configuration and China catalogue scope

source.publisher: Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS), Department of Trade and Industry

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Confirm whether the exported item is a bare motor or an electronic motor system; EMC evidence should match the exact Philippines configuration and not just a China domestic component report.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应确认出口物项是裸电机还是电子电机系统；EMC 证据应匹配准确的菲律宾配置，而不只是中国国内部件报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應確認出口物項是裸電機還是電子電機系統；EMC 證據應匹配準確的菲律賓配置，而不只是中國國內部件報告。

requirement_topic.en: NTC Approval for Radio-Enabled Motor Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: 带无线功能电机设备的 NTC 批准
requirement_topic.zht: 帶無線功能電機設備的 NTC 批准

summary.en: If the motor, drive, controller, gateway, sensor, or monitoring module includes Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, LoRa, RFID, or other radio transmission, the radio module or finished equipment may need approval from the National Telecommunications Commission before import or sale.
summary.zh: 如果电机、驱动器、控制器、网关、传感器或监测模块包含 Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、LoRa、RFID 或其他无线发射功能，则无线模块或整机可能需要在进口或销售前取得国家电信委员会批准。
summary.zht: 如果電機、驅動器、控制器、閘道器、感測器或監測模組包含 Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩、LoRa、RFID 或其他無線發射功能，則無線模組或整機可能需要在進口或銷售前取得國家電信委員會批准。

standards_or_laws: National Telecommunications Commission equipment approval rules
Philippines radio equipment type approval requirements

summary.en: China radio-enabled control modules may hold SRRC or CCC-related approvals for China, while the motor itself may rely on GB 18613, GB 12665, and CCC where applicable. China radio approvals do not replace Philippines NTC approval.
summary.zh: 中国带无线功能的控制模块可能持有 SRRC 或 CCC 相关中国批准，而电机本体可能依据 GB 18613、GB 12665 和适用时的 CCC。中国无线批准不能替代菲律宾 NTC 批准。
summary.zht: 中國帶無線功能的控制模組可能持有 SRRC 或 CCC 相關中國批准，而電機本體可能依據 GB 18613、GB 12665 和適用時的 CCC。中國無線批准不能替代菲律賓 NTC 批准。

standards_or_laws: SRRC radio approval where applicable in China
CCC catalogue requirements for motors under 1 kV where applicable

gap.en: The gap appears when a motor product becomes connected equipment. Even if the motor and drive satisfy PNS/IEC or DOE requirements, an embedded radio module can create a separate NTC approval path before Philippines import or sale.
gap.zh: 当电机产品成为联网设备时会出现该差距。即使电机和驱动器满足 PNS/IEC 或能源部要求，内置无线模块也可能在菲律宾进口或销售前触发单独的 NTC 批准路径。
gap.zht: 當電機產品成為聯網設備時會出現該差距。即使電機和驅動器符合 PNS/IEC 或能源部要求，內置無線模組也可能在菲律賓進口或銷售前觸發單獨的 NTC 批准路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — mandatory when radio transmitters are included
mandatory_status.cn: Conditional — China radio and CCC approvals depend on product configuration

source.publisher: National Telecommunications Commission, Republic of the Philippines

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Screen industrial motors for wireless modules. If any radio function is present, add an NTC approval check alongside BPS/DTI and DOE compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应筛查工业电动机是否包含无线模块。如存在任何无线功能，应在 BPS/DTI 和能源部合规之外增加 NTC 批准核查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應篩查工業電動機是否包含無線模組。如存在任何無線功能，應在 BPS/DTI 和能源部合規之外增加 NTC 批准核查。
